title: Principal Radiologist at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Radiologist to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates!
